readings.citation:
Ps 97:1-2, 6-7, 9, R. v.1a and 9a
I believe that I shall see the good things of the Lord in the land of the living.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 97:1-2, 6-7, 9, R. v.1a and 9a
I believe that I shall see the good things of the Lord in the land of the living.

readings.summary: John hears a voice, "I shall be with you soon."

I will not leave you orphans, says the Lord.
I will come back to you, and your heart will rejoice.
Jesus prays to the Father for his disciples.

antiphons.text:
If you love me, keep my commandments,
says the Lord, and I will ask the Father
and he will send you another Paraclete,
to abide with you for ever, alleluia.

prelude.title: Regina Caeli / O Queen of Heaven
prelude.description: Pope Leo XIV singing Regina Caeli

gathering.title: Your Peace Will Make Us One
gathering.description: "Peace I leave with you; my peace I give to you."
